meaning: n.职业,占有,占有(房屋等)期间
examples: Her main occupation seems to be shopping.
I suppose I was looking for an occupation which was going to be an adventure.
You will be asked to fill in a form with details of your birth and occupation.
Fishing is a legendarily hazardous occupation, particularly Alaskan shellfishing, and fatalities have been increasing in recent years.
And Germany took a forced loan from the Bank of Greece to cover the occupation cost.
